case_title: DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. VAN C. PITTSENBARGAR et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-15-2008 CONTINUED TO MAY-16-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER OF THE DISCOVER CARD
